response.justification: Mohammed has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems-level capability, but the absence of demonstrated expertise in routing tiling, real-time traffic integration, or production-grade geospatial data systems raises significant gaps.
strengths: Proven geospatial project experience via open-source GISCollective platform
Strong systems-level programming background with DLang and low-latency systems
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks
concerns: No visible C++ or Rust experience in commercial or routing-related contexts
Lacks explicit experience with routing data pipelines, tiling, or navigation systems
Minimal evidence of distributed systems work (fault tolerance, consistency, service discovery)
